mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_kpi_record WHERE record_year = #{year} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY kpi_type, record_month
SELECT * FROM tb_kpi_record WHERE kpi_type = #{kpiType} AND record_year = #{year} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY record_month
SELECT * FROM tb_kpi_record WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_kpi_record (kpi_type, record_year, record_month, target_value, actual_value, unit, department, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{kpiType}, #{recordYear}, #{recordMonth}, #{targetValue}, #{actualValue}, #{unit}, #{department}, #{notes}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_kpi_record SET target_value=#{targetValue}, actual_value=#{actualValue}, unit=#{unit}, department=#{department}, notes=#{notes}, modified_at=GETDATE() WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE tb_kpi_record SET deleted=1, modified_at=GETDATE() WHERE id=#{id}
